headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release And Conference Call Date
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE: AJG) will release its first quarter 2026 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. A printer-friendly format will be available on the company's website shortly thereafter.
